<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Product</th>
      <th>Q1</th>
      <th>Q2</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td>Widget A</td><td>1,200</td><td>1,450</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Widget B</td><td>900</td><td>1,100</td></tr>
    <tr><th scope="row">Widgets Total</th><td>2,100</td><td>2,550</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Gadget X</td><td>3,400</td><td>3,800</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Gadget Y</td><td>2,200</td><td>2,500</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Gadget Z</td><td>1,100</td><td>1,250</td></tr>
    <tr><th scope="row">Gadgets Total</th><td>6,700</td><td>7,550</td></tr>
    <tr><th scope="row">Grand Total</th><td>8,800</td><td>10,100</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
